Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.builders

Class FlixelShakeTweenBuilder

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.builders.FlixelAbstractTweenBuilder<FlixelShakeTween,FlixelShakeTweenBuilder>
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.builders.FlixelShakeTweenBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
FlixelTweenBuilder<FlixelShakeTween>
public final class FlixelShakeTweenBuilder extends FlixelAbstractTweenBuilder<FlixelShakeTween,FlixelShakeTweenBuilder>
Fluent builder for FlixelShakeTween. Defaults are FlixelShakeTween.ShakeUnit.FRACTION with intensity 0.05f, no fade-out taper.

    Builds the tween from the current configuration, adds it to the global tween manager, starts it, and returns the started tween.

  • Constructor Details

    • FlixelShakeTweenBuilder

      public FlixelShakeTweenBuilder()

  • Method Details

    • setSprite

      public FlixelShakeTweenBuilder setSprite(@Nullable @Nullable FlixelSprite sprite)

    • setAxes

      public FlixelShakeTweenBuilder setAxes(FlixelAxes axes)

    • setIntensity

      public FlixelShakeTweenBuilder setIntensity(float intensity)
      Maximum shake amount. Meaning depends on the setShakeUnit(ShakeUnit) setting. Default 0.05f is appropriate for FlixelShakeTween.ShakeUnit.FRACTION.

    • setShakeUnit

      public FlixelShakeTweenBuilder setShakeUnit(FlixelShakeTween.ShakeUnit shakeUnit)
      FlixelShakeTween.ShakeUnit.FRACTION by default (sprite size scaled). Use FlixelShakeTween.ShakeUnit.PIXELS for absolute pixel half-range.

    • setFadeOut

      public FlixelShakeTweenBuilder setFadeOut(boolean fadeOut)
      When true, shake amplitude tapers to zero over the tween duration. When false, full range each frame until completion.

    • start

      public FlixelShakeTween start()
      Description copied from interface: FlixelTweenBuilder
      Builds the tween from the current configuration, adds it to the global tween manager, starts it, and returns the started tween.
      Returns:
      The started tween instance.
